source_verdict: DS088 is primarily a GEMINI I/LTS vedolizumab UC biopsy-expression study with an embedded IFX comparator. GEO states 120 biopsies from 44 UC patients in GEMINI vedolizumab trials, 12 non-IBD biopsies, and IFX biopsies from 23 UC patients before and week 4-6 after first IFX.
overlap_risk: Possible IFX-comparator overlap with DS061/GSE16879; public GEO metadata reviewed here do not provide a direct subject-ID crosswalk, so independent counting should remain Unclear.
